hero.sub: A boutique dental practice in Dubai Marina — same-day appointments, English & Arabic-speaking specialists, and a calm space designed for people who don't love the dentist.

trust.yearsBody: Marina Pearl is a five-chair practice built around three specialist dentists and a philosophy: technology should make your visit shorter, not louder.
bullets: Digital scanners — no impressions, no gagging

services.heading: What we do
services.sub: Every treatment is planned around your teeth, your budget, and the twelve months of your life we don't want to interrupt.

doctors.heading: Meet your dentists
doctors.sub: Three specialists. Twenty-plus years of combined experience. One shared conviction: gentle care outperforms rushed care.

footer.rights: © 2026 Marina Pearl Dental Clinic. Fictional demo — all names, addresses and images are placeholders.

booking.doctorPrompt: Who would you like to see?
booking.anyDoctorSub: We'll choose the earliest specialist match.
booking.noSlots: No slots available on that day. Try another date.
booking.consent: I agree to the Privacy Policy and consent to Marina Pearl Dental collecting and processing my personal data to manage my appointment.
booking.successBody: We've sent a confirmation to your email. You can reschedule or cancel any time up to 24 hours before.
